heading: Software We Specialize In
intro: We are certified partners for Malaysia's leading accounting and business software solutions.

items.name: AutoCount Accounting
items.desc: Malaysia's leading cloud and desktop accounting software. Full SST and e-Invoice ready.

items.name: AutoCount POS
items.desc: Retail POS for checkout, inventory control, outlet reporting, and AutoCount Accounting posting.

items.desc: Cloud F&B POS for table management, QR ordering, kitchen display, delivery, and reporting.
